title: cyrtomium falcatum
intro: Cyrtomium falcatum, also known as the netted spleenwort or net veined spleenwort, is a type of fern native to Japan and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Cyrtomium falcatum include its potential to improve circulation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyrtomium falcatum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use should be limited due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
